## Entities.IngredientInventoryLibrary.getForIngredient() method

Gets the inventory entry for a specific ingredient by searching all entries.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getForIngredient(ingredientId: IngredientId): Result<IIngredientInventoryEntry>;
```
